_policy: Only list jobs from companies/sources where we have high-confidence hiring criteria. Meridian is premium: we apply verified criteria to students. meridian_scores = required Smart/Grit/Build (and optional track) to treat job as Target vs Reach.

rules.criteria_source: OPM.gov, USA Staffing, agency hiring manuals
rules.criteria_for_llm: Federal hiring uses OPM qualifications, GS levels, USA Staffing. Key competencies: written communication, technical competency, leadership, teamwork. Internships: Pathways Internship Program. Emphasize relevant coursework, GPA, and any federal or public-sector experience.

Stripe looks for: technical depth (systems, APIs, data), ownership, shipping culture. Projects with real users or deployments. Strong written communication. Interns: demonstrate learning velocity and curiosity.
Figma values: design sensibility, collaboration, building for makers. Design or product roles: portfolio, user empathy, cross-functional work. Engineering: systems thinking, craft, shipping.

Google values: technical depth, problem-solving, impact with scale. Resume: quantifiable impact, clean formatting, projects with real users. Interns: demonstrate learning velocity, coding ability, diversity of experience. GPA and school are factors but not the only signal.

Microsoft looks for: technical skills, growth mindset, collaboration. Students: relevant coursework, projects, internships. Engineering: systems thinking, coding, and ability to learn. Emphasize impact and teamwork.

Amazon uses Leadership Principles in hiring. Emphasize: ownership, bias for action, customer obsession, deliver results. Technical roles: depth in CS fundamentals, projects, quantifiable impact. Interns: show you can deliver and learn.
Meta values: building at scale, impact, moving fast. Engineering: strong CS fundamentals, shipped projects, systems or product impact. Emphasize technical depth and measurable outcomes.
Apple looks for: craft, attention to detail, collaboration. Technical roles: strong fundamentals, projects that show quality and impact. Interns: demonstrate curiosity and ability to ship.
Netflix values: judgment, impact, curiosity, inclusion. Senior bar for all roles. Emphasize high-impact work, ownership, and clear communication. Technical: depth and breadth, shipped systems.
Salesforce values: trust, customer success, innovation. Technical: cloud, data, integration experience helpful. Emphasize teamwork, impact, and alignment with Ohana culture.
Adobe looks for: creativity, technical skill, collaboration. Design and engineering: portfolio or projects, user impact. Emphasize craft and measurable outcomes.
IBM values: technical depth, client focus, growth mindset. Students: relevant major, projects, internships. Emphasize learning agility and impact in technical or consulting roles.
Oracle looks for: technical skills in cloud, data, or enterprise software. Students: coursework and projects in relevant areas. Emphasize problem-solving and delivery.

rules.criteria_source: goldmansachs.com/careers/students; Vault, Wall Street Prep, M&I recruiting guides
rules.criteria_for_llm: Goldman Sachs: strong GPA (3.7+ for IBD), technical modeling and deal knowledge, leadership, polish. Emphasize finance/economics/accounting coursework, Excel/modeling, quantifiable impact, and finance-related internships or investment club.

Morgan Stanley: similar bar to GS. GPA and school matter; technical modeling, professional presentation. IBD and Wealth Management pathways. Emphasize leadership, quant impact, and finance internship or club experience.
JP Morgan: broadest entry-level programs (IBD, Asset Management, Markets). GPA 3.5+ typical; quant impact, leadership, Excel/modeling. Emphasize relevant coursework and internship or club experience.
JP Morgan: broadest entry-level programs (IBD, Asset Management, Markets). GPA 3.5+ typical; quant impact, leadership, Excel/modeling. Emphasize relevant coursework and internship or club experience.

Blackstone (PE): typically recruits from 1st-year IB analysts. GPA and bank brand critical. For undergrad: emphasize top GPA, leadership, modeling, and finance internship. PE direct from undergrad is rare.
KKR (PE): recruits heavily from top IB analysts. For undergrad: exceptional GPA, modeling, leadership. Emphasize deal exposure, quant impact, and finance org involvement.
Lazard (elite boutique IB): GPA 3.7+, high deal responsibility, modeling. Emphasize technical modeling, leadership, and finance internship or investment club.
Evercore (elite boutique): similar bar to Lazard. Modeling, deal experience, leadership. Emphasize DCF/LBO, internship, and finance org leadership.

McKinsey: GPA 3.7+ for MBB, structured thinking, PEI (Personal Experience Interview). Case and behavioral rigor. Emphasize problem-solving at scale, leadership, quant/analytical projects, and case competition or consulting club.
McKinsey: GPA 3.7+ for MBB, structured thinking, PEI. Case and behavioral rigor. Emphasize problem-solving at scale, leadership, quant/analytical projects, case competition or consulting club.
BCG: GPA 3.6+, case and behavioral. Values innovation, entrepreneurial mindset. Emphasize case competition, leadership, data-driven projects. Tech + consulting backgrounds differentiating.
BCG: GPA 3.6+, case and behavioral. Values innovation, entrepreneurial mindset. Emphasize case competition, leadership, data-driven projects.
Bain: GPA 3.6+, collegial culture, strong analyst training. Case and behavioral. Emphasize case club, leadership, quant/strategy projects. High PE placement from Bain.
Bain: GPA 3.6+, case and behavioral. Emphasize case club, leadership, quant/strategy projects.

Deloitte: Strategy & Operations (S&O) is MBB-adjacent; GPA 3.5+. Consulting: case and behavioral, analytical rigor. Emphasize case competition, leadership, data or strategy projects. Good bridge to MBB lateral.
EY: EY-Parthenon for strategy; broader EY for advisory. GPA 3.5+ for strategy. Emphasize analytical projects, leadership, case or consulting club experience.
KPMG: advisory and consulting; GPA and analytical skills. Emphasize leadership, quant/analytical work, and relevant internship or club experience.
Accenture: technology and strategy consulting. Emphasize problem-solving, teamwork, technical or analytical projects. Broad entry points for students.

Oliver Wyman: Tier 2 strategy; strong in financial services. GPA 3.5+, analytical rigor. Emphasize case competition, data-driven projects, leadership. Differentiating for finance/insurance consulting.
Airbnb values: design, belonging, craft. Engineering: impact, ownership, systems thinking. Emphasize projects with real users, collaboration, and measurable outcomes.
Spotify looks for: passion for music/product, technical depth, collaboration. Emphasize shipped projects, impact, and culture fit.
Uber values: impact at scale, ownership, boldness. Technical: systems, data, product. Emphasize quantifiable impact and shipped work.
Lyft looks for: technical skill, mission alignment, teamwork. Emphasize projects, impact, and learning velocity.
Twilio values: builders, API/developer focus, ownership. Emphasize technical depth, shipped projects, and developer experience.
Datadog: observability, infrastructure, engineering. Emphasize systems thinking, metrics/impact, and technical projects.
Snowflake: data cloud, engineering bar. Emphasize data systems, scalability, and technical impact.
ServiceNow: enterprise software, platform. Emphasize technical depth, delivery, and customer impact.
Workday: enterprise HR/finance software. Emphasize technical skills, teamwork, and relevant coursework or projects.
Intuit: fintech, TurboTax, QuickBooks. Emphasize technical and product impact, customer focus, and innovation.
PayPal: fintech, payments. Emphasize technical depth, security/scale, and measurable impact.
Visa: payments, global scale. Emphasize technical or analytical projects, leadership, and impact.
Mastercard: payments, data, innovation. Emphasize technical skills, teamwork, and quantifiable impact.

Hinge Health (digital musculoskeletal care) looks for clinical knowledge, patient empathy, and healthcare operations experience. Clinical roles: PT/OT background or shadowing, patient-facing hours, telehealth comfort. Operations: process improvement, healthcare workflow knowledge. Emphasize any clinical certifications (CNA, BLS, EMT), EHR experience (Epic/Cerner), and patient contact hours.

Noom (digital health/behavior change) values psychology, health coaching, and digital product knowledge. Health coaching roles: health coaching certification or psychology/nutrition background, motivational interviewing skills, empathy. Operations: data analysis, process improvement. Emphasize any health coaching credentials, wellness programming experience, or patient-facing work.

Headway (mental health practice platform) looks for healthcare operations, insurance/billing knowledge, and empathy for mental health providers. Operations roles: insurance credentialing, prior authorization, billing knowledge, EHR understanding. Emphasize any mental health volunteering, crisis counseling experience, HIPAA awareness, or healthcare admin background.

Zocdoc (healthcare scheduling marketplace) values healthcare knowledge, customer success skills, and tech-adjacent operations. Provider success roles: understanding of healthcare practices, scheduling, insurance verification. Emphasize healthcare customer-facing experience, familiarity with how clinics operate, and any EHR or medical office experience.

Color Health (preventive genomics and public health) values public health knowledge, patient advocacy, and clinical operations. Clinical coordination roles: patient education, care navigation, clinical certifications, HIPAA. Public health roles: epidemiology coursework, health equity focus, community outreach. Emphasize public health coursework, clinical certifications, and community health experience.

Included Health (virtual care navigation) looks for care navigation, health equity, and clinical knowledge. Care guide roles: patient advocacy, health literacy skills, knowledge of healthcare system navigation, empathy. Clinical roles: CNA or MA experience, telehealth comfort, EHR familiarity. Emphasize patient-facing hours, clinical certifications, and any care coordination experience.

Calibrate (metabolic health/GLP-1 management) values health coaching, patient engagement, and clinical coordination. Coaching roles: health coaching background, motivational interviewing, metabolic health knowledge, empathy. Clinical roles: care coordination, EHR documentation, clinical team support. Emphasize any health coaching certification, clinical experience, and patient-centered communication skills.

Clio (legal practice management software) values legal knowledge, customer success, and operations. Legal success roles: paralegal background or legal studies, understanding of law firm workflows, Clio product knowledge preferred. Sales/implementation: strong communication, legal tech enthusiasm, ability to explain software to lawyers. Emphasize any legal experience (paralegal, legal assistant, law clerk), Westlaw/LexisNexis familiarity, and law firm workflow knowledge.

Ironclad (contract lifecycle management) values legal operations, contract knowledge, and tech-adjacent skills. Legal implementation roles: contract lifecycle understanding, legal knowledge, process documentation. Customer success: ability to translate legal concepts to business users. Emphasize any contract drafting experience, compliance or legal operations internship, legal writing samples, and Westlaw/LexisNexis proficiency.

Relativity (legal e-discovery platform) values legal tech, litigation support, and project management. Legal roles: e-discovery knowledge, document review experience, EDRM (Electronic Discovery Reference Model) familiarity. Project roles: litigation support, legal project coordination, attention to detail. Emphasize any litigation support or paralegal experience, document review work, and understanding of legal processes (discovery, trial preparation, privilege review).

Thomson Reuters (Westlaw, legal information) values legal research, content knowledge, and legal technology. Editorial/content roles: legal research proficiency, Westlaw expertise, Bluebook citation, legal writing quality. Legal analyst roles: case law analysis, regulatory monitoring, legal summarization. Emphasize Westlaw proficiency, Bluebook accuracy, legal research experience, and any legal writing samples or law review work.

Wolters Kluwer (legal, regulatory, and compliance information) values regulatory knowledge, legal research, and compliance expertise. Compliance roles: regulatory monitoring, compliance framework knowledge, legal research. Legal content roles: case analysis, regulatory tracking, Bluebook citation. Emphasize any compliance internship, regulatory research experience, legal writing, and understanding of compliance frameworks (AML, FCPA, GDPR, SOX).
